About Your Mentor

MEET HONOURABLE

🏆
700+ Students
Empowered & Counting
🎓
Google
Certified

Onowiome Honourable is a forward-thinking tech innovator, certified AI Generalist, and automation specialist with a strong foundation in Generative AI. Known for turning complex ideas into practical solutions, he has built a reputation as a results-driven problem solver in the evolving world of artificial intelligence.

A standout among tech-driven students at Lagos State University (LASU), he combines a solid mathematical and analytical background with hands-on expertise in intelligent systems and AI-powered business solutions.

Honourable holds professional certifications from globally recognized platforms such as Google and Analytics Vidhya. He has successfully hosted an AI Masterclass that empowered over 700 individuals, and is also the host of the LASU AI Bootcamp.

His teaching style focuses on clarity, real-world application, and empowering learners to build confidently — taking you from curiosity to confidence.

Why This Program

BUILT FOR RESULTS

🎯
100% Practical

No fluff. Every session is focused on real-world skills you can apply immediately — from day one to after graduation.

🤝
Personal Guidance

VIP members get direct one-on-one sessions tailored to their specific goals and learning pace. You're never left behind.

💰
Income-Ready Skills

Learn how to use AI to create content, automate tasks, and build services people and businesses actually pay for.

🌍
Global Certification

Get guided to earn certificates from Google and other leading AI platforms — credentials recognized worldwide.

🏗️
Build Websites & Apps

Go beyond prompts — learn to build functional websites and apps using AI tools, with or without a coding background.

📲
Flexible Payment

Instalment payments are allowed. No financial pressure — your learning journey starts on your own terms.
